name: stitch-designer
description: Design high-quality screens with Google Stitch MCP from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Generate and refine Stitch UI designs from Codex
interface.longDescription: Context-aware design workflow for Google Stitch MCP. Helps Codex choose whether to reuse or create Stitch projects, write strong mobile/web/dashboard/game prompts, generate variants, critique results, and produce implementation handoffs.
defaultPrompt: Create a mobile screen in Stitch matching my app style
Critique this Stitch screen and refine it
